SEARCH

Uses of Class
client.app.Session

Packages that use Session
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
client.boundary
Client JavaFX entry point: the Application subclass that boots the GoNature client, builds the primary stage, and hands control to the navigator and the first view.
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.

  • Uses of Session in client.app

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Session
    Navigator.session
    Session injected into controllers that request it.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Navigator(StackPane contentArea, NetworkService network, Session session, Consumer<Navigator.Screen> onScreenChange)
    Creates a navigator bound to the shell's content area.

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    DashboardController.session
    The current client session (identity and role).
    private final Session
    MainShellController.session
    The current client session (identity, connection, role).
    private final Session

    The current client session (used to prefill a logged-in visitor).
    private final Session
    ReservationListController.session
    The current client session (used to detect a logged-in visitor).
    private final Session
    UserLoginController.session
    The current client session (holds the connection and identity).
    private final Session
    WaitlistController.session
    The current client session (provides the visitor's id).

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.DEPT_MANAGER_ONLY
    Visible to the department-manager role only.
    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.EVERYONE
    Visible to any logged-in identity.
    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.PARK_EMPLOYEE_ONLY
    Visible to the park-employee role only.
    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.PARK_MANAGER_ONLY
    Visible to the park-manager role only.
    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.SERVICE_REP_ONLY
    Visible to the service-representative role only.

    private static final Predicate<Session>
    MainShellController.VISITOR_ONLY
